name: MailruMail
description: Read, search and send Mail.ru email over IMAP/SMTP.
note: Mail.ru requires an app password for IMAP — the account password is refused. Create one under Security → “Пароли для внешних приложений” and enable IMAP in mail settings if it's off.

setupSteps.text: Open Mail.ru ID → Security → “Пароли для внешних приложений” and create a password for mail.
Use your full address as the login.

mail.authHint: check the login is the FULL address, the password is an app password (not the account one), and that IMAP is enabled in Mail.ru settings.
